interaction: change UI size and readable-code size independently, then inspect scaled sidebar action glyphs

environment.deliverySurface: real ProductClient Web plus isolated Desktop renderer; not packaged Desktop
environment.hmr: Vite HMR enabled; the Web renderer was restarted after the production budget build and captures were taken after session restoration

matched: one legible scale per semantic role
readable code at the surrounding reading size
proliferateDifferences: eight independent UI and readable-code presets
existing product hierarchy, font family, themes, and 46rem chat column

limitations: The primary recording is assembled from live exact-working-tree frames so each independent preference state remains inspectable without relying on a temporary preview.

The populated transcript comparison is the real ProductClient chat playground fixture; the product shell and corrected repository actions are separately captured on the real Web and isolated Desktop renderer surfaces.
No Rust build, Docker service, or packaged Desktop capture was used for this frontend-only slice.
